cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We are thinking of driving over this Saturday for one night. Do you still have a courtyard room with breakfast for two?
context_window: user already sounds close to booking

mustInclude: acknowledge the easy weekend-break intention
anchor the reply in dates, guest count, and courtyard-room preference
guide toward the next booking detail without overselling
mustAvoid: promising availability without live context
dumping every room option

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: It is our anniversary next month. If we book the tub room, can you arrange something simple with a cake and make it feel private?

mustInclude: acknowledge the anniversary context
state that celebration details depend on the property and stay setup
guide toward the date and the one or two arrangement details that matter most
mustAvoid: guaranteeing free decor or exact setup results
treating the occasion like a standard booking

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We want to bring our small dog for two nights. Is the courtyard room pet friendly, and are there any extra rules?

mustInclude: acknowledge the desire to avoid pet-related friction
ask for pet details plus the exact room or dates if needed
guide toward policy confirmation without oversimplifying
mustAvoid: saying all rooms allow pets
skipping pet size or count context

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Your videos look nice, but does the mountain-view room actually look like that in real life?

mustInclude: de-escalation
invite one concrete room detail such as view angle, tub, or terrace setup
leave room for the user to keep the conversation going
mustAvoid: best-view bragging
guaranteeing exact match to social content

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: We may not get there until 11:30 tonight. If we book now, can someone still check us in?

mustInclude: acknowledge the late-arrival stress
state that check-in handling depends on the property and timing
guide toward the exact property and arrival window
mustAvoid: guaranteeing midnight check-in without verification
pushing the user to pay first and ask later

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: We are planning a birthday weekend for 8 friends and might want to book the whole place. Is that possible?

mustInclude: recognize the request as a serious group booking
ask for the dates, headcount, and whether they want full buyout or several rooms
keep boundaries around shared-space use or quiet hours calm and natural
mustAvoid: promising a party setup without scope
ignoring house-rule implications

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: Can two adults and our 4-year-old stay in the loft room, or can you add an extra bed there?

mustInclude: acknowledge the family-fit concern
ask for the child's age and bedding need while noting that layout matters
guide toward room-fit clarification instead of a broad yes
mustAvoid: guaranteeing the loft works for every child
ignoring the extra-bed limitation risk

cases.label: edge_case

input.user_message: We want the terrace room for blossom season next week. Will the view definitely still look like the photos if it rains?

mustInclude: acknowledge the concern about the trip atmosphere
state that view experience depends on dates and weather conditions
guide toward the exact dates and the scene they care about most
mustAvoid: guaranteeing blossoms or perfect terrace weather
brushing off seasonal uncertainty

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: I saw your room on an OTA app. Does that rate include breakfast and afternoon tea, or is that a different package?
context_window: user may be close to booking

mustInclude: acknowledge the inclusion question
mention that breakfast and tea depend on the plan or channel
guide toward the exact rate or package details
mustAvoid: saying every room includes the same extras
ignoring the OTA context

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: I already paid a deposit through your booking link, but our plan changed. Can you just refund it in full?

mustInclude: acknowledge the inconvenience
state that refund handling depends on the booking terms and channel
guide toward the reservation details for the next step
mustAvoid: promising a refund before checking the booking context
treating every deposit policy as identical

cases.label: failure_case

input.user_message: The room smells damp, the tub was not clean, and the photos made it look much better than this.

mustInclude: empathy first
request the property and room or booking details through a safer channel
handoff toward a human service path
mustAvoid: blaming the guest publicly
arguing about the pictures in public

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: Send me your WeChat or phone. I want to lock the tub room tonight.

mustInclude: welcome the intent to move quickly
use platform DM as the safe bridge
request the property or stay details as the next action
mustAvoid: posting off-platform contact publicly
sounding evasive or robotic

cases.label: happy_path

input.user_message: I want a quiet weekday stay where I can read and do a little laptop work. Which room type should I look at?
context_window: user wants quietness and some work comfort
room selection matters more than price first

mustInclude: acknowledge the quiet slow-stay purpose
ask whether quietness, desk setup, or natural light matters most
guide toward a room-fit clarification without overpromising
mustAvoid: guaranteeing total silence
dumping every room category with no fit logic
